summary: A clipped Fox News LIVE broadcast segment ('FOX NEWS ALERT', 'HOMAN HEADS TO MINNEAPOLIS', 'TRUMP SENDS BORDER CZAR TOM HOMAN TO MINNEAPOLIS') featuring two anchors and an interview with DHS Assistant Secretary Tricia McLaughlin, plus a WSJ opinion graphic about Tim Walz. Standard TV news capture with network chyrons and weather/power-outage tickers, not produced entertainment content.
notable_text: HOMAN HEADS TO MINNEAPOLIS AMID SOARING TENSIONS
TRUMP SENDS BORDER CZAR TOM HOMAN TO MINNEAPOLIS
